calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of three minors.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioners Maryam Monsef and Alan Sagetelyan, parents of the three minros, were was present in pro per.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Names of the three minors as follows:

(1) Alexander Mihran Sagatelyan to Alexandre Mihran Monsef-Sagatelyan;
(2) Camilla Homa Sagatelyan to Camilla Homa Monsef-Sagatelyan; and
(3) Emilia Maryam Sagatelyan to Emelia Maryam Monsef-Sagatelyan.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
